title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5, a cheaper agent model
summary: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5, a cheaper agent model Image by: Anthropic Anthropic has launched Claude Sonnet 5, its most agentic mid-tier model yet. It runs close to the flagship Opus 4.8 on many tasks, but costs less than half as much.
